insight: Dashboard refactor from DOMParser+textContent extraction to JSON API + innerHTML removed the implicit HTML-stripping and opened a stored-XSS path for RSS/SEC content; always esc() untrusted strings before innerHTML
FastAPI service must init_db() at startup (lifespan), otherwise fresh deploys 500 on tables-missing when the web starts before the first pipeline run
GS-Tracker is a solo repo that ships directly on main; /ship base-branch abort rule does not apply. No VERSION/CHANGELOG/TODOS files exist — version steps are skipped.
signal_fingerprint should include url when available: (source, title, publish_date, url) hash. Same-day same-title different filings (common for 8-K) would otherwise collide
fetch_since(watermark) should return (List[Signal], str) tuple so the caller knows what watermark to advance to — each source knows its own watermark format best
SQLite does not support ALTER TABLE DROP PRIMARY KEY. Changing signal_runs PK from quarter to (quarter, job) requires 4-step migration: CREATE TABLE new → INSERT SELECT → DROP old → RENAME new
